description: Likely removes distractor colors or extracts/recolors the relevant structure while preserving the canvas size. Removes input color(s) [4]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: color subset. Inferred transformation family: delete/extract/recolor.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_b8825c91(I):
    x1 = replace(I, FOUR, ZERO)
    x2 = dmirror(x1)
    x3 = papply(pair, x1, x2)
    x4 = lbind(apply, maximum)
    x5 = apply(x4, x3)
    x6 = cmirror(x5)
    x7 = papply(pair, x5, x6)
    x8 = apply(x4, x7)
    O = cmirror(x8)
    return O
